description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: Currently, in the transition to Endgame, the Immutable Documents (Articles and Sections) can be amended pursuant to [A.1.

- Monthly Governance Cycle](7f2ba62c-9b3b-4df6-aa16-189a749cffa3)[**.**](7f2ba62c-9b3b-4df6-aa16-189a749cffa3) Once the Sky Ecosystem enters the Endgame State, the Immutable Documents of the Atlas will be forever locked down and cannot be changed.

Currently, in the transition to Endgame, the Immutable Documents (Articles and Sections) can be amended pursuant to [A.1.11 - Weekly Governance Cycle](83edd4e1-692e-4566-a415-b8f272c33c5e) and [A.1.12 - Monthly Governance Cycle](7f2ba62c-9b3b-4df6-aa16-189a749cffa3)
Once the Sky Ecosystem enters the Endgame State, the Immutable Documents of the Atlas will be forever locked down and cannot be changed.
